calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: August 29,2002
Judge Pro Tem: Karl Olson
CSR: Beldon Yee

Case called for settlement conference- All parties present. Plaintiff's counsel recited the following on the record: Judgment for Plaintiff. Possession of premises located at 2135 Mission St.#21. Money judgment of $2581.00 waived if premises vacated by September 3,2002 at 9:00 am. Defendant to owe nothing if premises vacated on time. Writ of possession may issue immediately. Writ stayed to September 3,2002 at 9:00am. Each side to bear own costs.Plaintiff to prepare order.
